channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Surface of Collett's (not placement of apostrophe - your road name is incorrect as it possessive) Drive roundabout is v.v.poor and requires resurfacing, 10th March
item.description:
Collett's Drive roundabout (yes this section IS public highway!)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colletts Drive, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The ONLY gully is full to c/w surface level with DRY soil/debris and is therefore totally ineffective removing nil surface water which then runs downslope and onto Gloucester Rd., 10th March
item.description:
(See precisely where pin was dropped!) Topside/upslope of lane access, nr driveway of recently renovated property. Has been the case for months!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various potholes, 10th March
item.description:
From Zebra Crossing to the area where the trees have been felled by Jordan Brook House. Various sized potholes,along that stretch and f North Upton Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Upton Lane, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Minimum of SIX tall street lights/lanterns are 'out'/unpowered - how can you not know this/have you no AI or CMS system giving you telemetry???, 10th March
item.description:
Lower Hight Streeet, between c.Frog & Fiddle pub and jctn Burton Street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 368, High Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on carriageway, 10th March
item.description:
As you approach the roundabout, second lane from left. there are number of potholes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Bypass, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light bulb gone in street light, 10th March
item.description:
Outside 4 croft Thorne close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Croft Thorne Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside 65 Keepers Mill is blocked and backing up to The Mead property right by the house, danger to property. We also have a child with complex care needs at high risk, 10th March
item.description:
The drain outside 65 Keepers Mill is blocked and backing up to The Mead right against the house as photos. Damage to property could be imminent. We have a complex care needs child with high medical risks. GL52 9PT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keepers Mill, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath spoilt, 10th March
item.description:
I originally reported this at the end of 2025 and 3 months later there has been no improvements to the path. It is unpassible due to the mud/clay and it is a well used path with school children

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warrener Close, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes, 10th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes and a larger area with loose stones. Outside number 16/18

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jackson Crescent, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags of other nations hanging from lamposts and trees, 10th March
item.description:
Full-sized flags of the Union Flag and some other nations are hanging in public view.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Two Hedges Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bus shelter, 10th March
item.description:
The bus shelter for the incoming D bus on the Evesham Road was removed during the construction of the cycle way, but has not been replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 10th March
item.description:
ENWD CWPH STATS REQUIRED 700 X 500 X 75mm ROAD CLOSURE MARKED X (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 10th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 10th March

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 10th March

item.title: This post cover is completely unattached., 10th March
item.description:
This post is outside 4 Larkhay road, it has a cover that protects the wiring. the cover has fallen off completely and needs fixing/securing urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 10th March
item.description:
